heading: I build new things, and I finish them.
paragraphs: I'm Prateek — a builder in Toronto who spent a decade taking products and messy processes from idea to shipped, then went all-in on AI.
Prodgeek Lab is my bet that the best use of all that is helping people like you build the thing you've been imagining. Tech is finally everyone's. Let's use it.
aside: I also make things for fun — @Beatoid
